author: Komputer Mechanic
title: OpenClaw Image Generation Setup
summary: Interactive installer for OpenClaw image generation. Supports OpenAI (gpt-image-1.5, gpt-image-1, gpt-image-1-mini) and fal.ai (7 models including FLUX and Nano Banana). Handles fresh setup, model switching, and uninstall. Automatically creates the openai_image and fal_image skills, updates openclaw.json, saves API keys to .env, and restarts the OpenClaw gateway.
